# Signed sidecar fixture

This fixture is generated by the exact `dom-node` build identified in
`sidecar-manifest.json`. Its `.invalid` URL is deliberately non-resolvable and
is metadata only. Fixture tests read the manifest, detached signature and
artifact bytes from explicit local paths; they must never dereference this URL.

The fixture proves release-key verification and must contain no private signing
material. Production private keys never enter this repository or CI.
